commit.message:
translate: update pt-br/photography.md gallery

- Add new photo #29231673 at gallery start
- Update all alt texts to numeric photo ID format (#XXXXXXX)
- Remove photos #28292145 and #28289537
- Add photo #28302088

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Detect Cloudflare challenge pages and combine photo detail fetches

- is_valid_lomography_response now rejects pages with CF challenge
  markers (Just a moment, cf_chl_opt, etc.) so curl failures fall
  through to cloudscraper which can solve the challenges.
- Combine fetch_photo_cdn_url + fetch_photo_title into a single
  fetch_photo_details call, halving the number of requests per photo.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Validate photo IDs in response before accepting fetch result

The Cloudflare challenge page on GH Actions contains lomography.com
references, so generic content validation passes. Instead, validate at
the parsing level: only accept a fetch if we actually find photo IDs in
the response. Both curl and cloudscraper are now tried on each attempt,
with retries and exponential backoff.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix Lomography workflow failing silently on Cloudflare blocks

- Add content validation (is_valid_lomography_response) to detect when
  curl/cloudscraper returns a Cloudflare challenge page instead of real
  Lomography content. Previously the >1000 byte check passed for
  challenge pages, skipping the cloudscraper fallback entirely.
- When 0 photos are found from the profile page, exit with error code 1
  instead of silently reporting no new photos. This makes the workflow
  fail visibly so the issue is noticed.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Pixi support (#2)

* Fix missing submodule for UCE (#15)

* Fix bug in preprocessing of sparse vs non-sparse adata  (#14)

* Simplify installation instructions in README

Removed redundant instruction for downloading the repository.

* Remove unnecessary extra environment for gseapy access (covered by main env)

* Update setup.sh to comment flash-attn installation

Comment out flash-attn installation due to environment issues.

* Add pixi and nix flake configuration for local development

Add pixi.toml with conda-forge dependencies (Python 3.10, PyTorch, scanpy,
geneformer, etc.) and pip editable install of cellwhisperer + cellxgene fork.
Include flake.nix providing a NixOS FHS environment to run pixi.

* Update cellxgene submodule: Werkzeug 3.x fix, pandas 2.x, rename to cellxgene-cellwhisperer

Points to epigen/cellxgene commit 90345e3 which includes:
- Fix FlatBuffers bytes/bytearray compatibility with Werkzeug 3.x
- Require pandas>=2.0.1
- Rename package to cellxgene-cellwhisperer to avoid conflicts
- Skip Puppeteer download in client Makefile

* Fix torch.load compatibility with PyTorch 2.6+

PyTorch 2.6 changed torch.load default to weights_only=True, which rejects
checkpoints containing custom classes (e.g. TranscriptomeTextDualEncoderConfig).
Pass weights_only=False explicitly where needed, and monkey-patch torch.load in
load_from_checkpoint to handle Lightning checkpoint loading.

* Make scgpt imports lazy to support environments without scgpt

Move scgpt imports inside functions that use them so the package can run with
geneformer (default) without requiring scgpt to be installed. Also use string
comparison for foundation model class checks to avoid import dependency.

* Add pixi installation instructions to README

Add pixi as the top-most (recommended) installation option, keeping the
existing conda instructions as Option B.

* Fix missing gseapy in pixi

* Replace local LLaVA/Mixtral with API + lightweight local curation

- llava_annotate_clusters now uses the hosted CellWhisperer API instead of
  requiring a local LLaVA model and separate conda env
- Unified curate_llava_annotations rule replaces separate gpt4/mixtral rules:
  uses OpenAI GPT-4 if OPENAI_API_KEY is valid, falls back to local
  Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct via transformers
- Add cellwhisperer_api_url to config.yaml (used by API annotation rule)
- Upgrade transformers>=4.45 and add accelerate for local model support
- Add gseapy dependency

* Retain local LLaVA annotation rule as llava_annotate_clusters_local

API-based rule is preferred via ruleorder. The local rule can be
invoked explicitly with --forcerun llava_annotate_clusters_local
and requires the llava conda env + GPU.

* Update README with pixi commands and new curation fallback docs

* Add news section to landing page (Pixi support, Mila talk)

* Revert "Add news section to landing page (Pixi support, Mila talk)"

This reverts commit 76f405e4d7a21f793a1993e96c6d96cf4d97cfbd.

* Fix checkpoint loading for newer transformers and add frontend build step to README

* Simplify Pixi setup: remove Nix files, drop uni dep, add setup script (#25)

* Initial plan

* Address review comments: remove flake files, remove uni dep, simplify README with setup script

Co-authored-by: moritzschaefer <2714540+moritzschaefer@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: moritzschaefer <2714540+moritzschaefer@users.noreply.github.com>

* Revise completion message in setup_pixi.sh

Updated final message to guide users on dataset preparation and starting the CellWhisperer webapp.

* removing uni

---------

Co-authored-by: Moritz <moritz@Moritzs-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: include plugin-core classes on runtime classpath for buildSearchableOptions

IPP 2.x buildSearchableOptions creates its own fresh sandbox separate from
the prepareSandbox output. The doLast hack that copies plugin-core-classes.jar
into the regular sandbox is not visible to buildSearchableOptions, so any
configurable or service that references plugin-core types fails with
ClassNotFoundException / "Can't instantiate configurable".

Fix: add runtimeOnly(files(repackagePluginCore)) after the repackagePluginCore
task declaration in both standalone-mcp and plugin-experimental. This puts the
repackaged JAR (no plugin.xml) on the runtime configuration, which IPP uses
when setting up the buildSearchableOptions classpath — so ToolPermissionsConfigurable
and all other plugin-core-backed configurables can be loaded without error.

The existing doLast copy in prepareSandbox is kept as belt-and-suspenders for
the regular sandbox (used by runIde / deploy-to-ide).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
chore: fix CI noise and security warnings

- ci.yml / release.yml: add FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24=true to
  silence Node.js 20 deprecation warnings (will be default June 2026)
- ci.yml / release.yml: add --quiet to all Gradle steps to suppress
  per-task progress output; add --silent to npm ci steps
- build.gradle.kts: update IntelliJ Platform Plugin 2.11.0 → 2.13.1
  to silence "outdated" warning during initialization
- standalone-mcp/build.gradle.kts: remove deprecated instrumentationTools()
  call (no longer necessary)
- js-tests/package.json: update happy-dom ^17.0.0 → ^20.0.0 to fix
  critical vulnerability (GHSA-37j7-fg3j-429f, VM context escape/RCE)
- AgentProfile.java: make getBinaryName() return "" instead of null
  when field is unset, keeping @NotNull contract honest
- AuthLoginService.kt: replace null-coalescing Elvis (?:) with
  .ifEmpty {} since binaryName is @NotNull (eliminates Kotlin warning)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: replace deprecated ReadAction.compute/run with ApplicationManager.runReadAction

Replace all usages of deprecated ReadAction.compute() and ReadAction.run()
with ApplicationManager.getApplication().runReadAction() across plugin-core
and plugin-experimental. These APIs are deprecated in IntelliJ 2026.1 (IU-261).

Also replace deprecated JBPopupFactory.createListPopupBuilder(JBList) with
createPopupChooserBuilder(List) in ChatToolWindowContent.kt, using the new
Consumer<T> callback instead of Runnable.

Document intentional use of experimental/scheduled-for-removal APIs in
PlatformApiCompat where no non-experimental alternatives exist:
- LafManager.getInstalledThemes() (@ApiStatus.Experimental, no alternative)
- DataPack via DataPackChangeListener (scheduled-for-removal, but using the
  internal DATA_PACK_REFRESH alternative would cause a build FAILURE)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: make current_apy time-weighted

- Store activation_timestamp when transitioning vault to Active state
- Calculate APY using formula: (yield / assets) * (seconds_per_year / elapsed_seconds) * 10000
- Handle edge cases: zero elapsed time, zero assets, zero yield
- Use checked arithmetic to prevent overflow on intermediate values

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Address PR #178 review feedback

- Add LLM_ENABLE_REPORTER config flag (independent of USE_LLM) so report
  generation is opt-in rather than an implicit side-effect of enabling LLMs
- Add --llm-report CLI flag wired to LLM_ENABLE_REPORTER
- Gate LLMReporter.generate() on USE_LLM AND LLM_ENABLE_REPORTER
- Gate fuzzer.py LLMReporter call behind config.LLM_ENABLE_REPORTER check
- Add _MAX_FINDINGS_IN_REPORT (50) and _MAX_SUMMARY_CHARS (1500) caps to
  prevent context-limit issues on large runs
- Fix _extract_json_from_text to validate isinstance(parsed, dict) and raise
  ValueError for non-object JSON (list/bool/etc.) so retry loop can correct it
- Add unit tests for LLMReporter: disabled flags, no detections, success path,
  LLM failure handling, truncation, and findings cap (10 new tests)
- Update README --help block and --use-llm description to reflect broader
  LLM scope (inference + endpoint classification + IDOR chain classification)
- Clarify USE_LLM comment in config.py to list all LLM-driven features

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add require_not_blacklisted guard function

Internal helper to check if an address is blacklisted and
panic with AddressBlacklisted error if so.

Add emit_address_blacklisted event function

Emit event when an address is blacklisted or unblacklisted.
Event includes the affected address and the new status.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add AddressBlacklisted error variant

Add error code 14 for blacklisted address operations.
This error is raised when a blacklisted address attempts
restricted operations or is the recipient of transfers.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add put_blacklisted storage setter function

Implement setter function to update blacklist status for an address.
TTL is extended on each update to ensure persistence.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Implement getter function to retrieve blacklist status for an address.
Returns false if the address has never been blacklisted.

Add new storage key for tracking blacklisted addresses per vault.
This will be used to store the blacklist status for each address.

commit.message:
fix: use `copilot login` for Copilot CLI auth

`copilot auth login` is not a valid subcommand — the CLI treats
unrecognised subcommands as AI prompts, producing "Invalid command
format". The correct command is `copilot login`.

Also fixes `startCopilotLogin()` (terminal fallback) to use the
same resolved command instead of the hardcoded wrong string.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

  Compose:_Config_AdminEmail at top of each flow
- Customers edit ONE action per flow to set their values

commit.message:
feat: convert all SharePoint list ops to HttpRequest for portability

- 19 actions converted: 6 PostItem, 4 PatchItem, 9 GetItems → HttpRequest
- Uses REST API URLs with getByTitle() instead of list GUIDs
- All list operations now work with dynamic @parameters() site URL
- File operations (GetFileContent/CreateFile) kept as-is
- Loop fix (RetryCount + PT30M timeout) preserved
- Zero hardcoded URLs or GUIDs remaining

Enables plug-and-play solution import across environments.

commit.message:
chore: add missing GET rule for /_template/:template_name permission path (#290)

* Initial plan

* fix: add missing GET method for /_template/:template_name permission path rule

The dev tools proxy reported 'unknown request path' for GET _template/legacy_logs
because the template permission section was missing a GET route. Added template.get
entry to allow GET requests to /_template/:template_name.

Co-authored-by: medcl <64487+medcl@users.noreply.github.com>
Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/infinilabs/console/sessions/7d821df3-2251-45ea-a8c0-08db564fbe75

* feat: add missing easysearch API permission rules for proxy routing

Add permission path rules for APIs documented in the easysearch REST API
reference that were missing from permission.json, causing 'unknown request
path' errors when accessed via the dev tools proxy.

New API categories added:
- async_search (submit, get, delete, stats)
- index_template (get, put, delete, exists, simulate)
- component_template (get, put, delete, exists)
- data_stream (get, create, delete, stats)
- ilm (get/put/delete policy, explain, add, change, remove, retry)
- resolve (resolve index)
- dangling_indices (list, import, delete)
- pit (create, delete, get all)
- search_pipeline (get, put, delete)
- transform (get, create, put, delete, explain, preview, start, stop)
- license (get, apply, delete)

Enhanced existing categories:
- cat: added parameterized routes (allocation/node_id, count/index, etc.)
- cluster: added _aliases POST, _cache/clear, _flush, _forcemerge, _refresh,
  _field_caps, _settings, _validate/query, _upgrade, _analyze, voting config,
  _ik/_reload, _refresh_search_analyzers, search_template, etc.
- indices: added clone, add_block, disk_usage, update_aliases, search_template,
  reload, and additional parameterized routes
- ingest: added per-pipeline ID routes for get/put/delete/simulate
- nodes: added parameterized stats/info/usage/hot_threads routes
- template: added GET all, HEAD exists, POST method
- rollup: added get, exists, start, stop, search routes
- scripts: added put with context, script_context, script_language
- snapshot: added list all, cleanup, clone, status with params
- reindex: added delete_by_query and update_by_query rethrottle
- sql: added explain, stats, settings
- tasks: added cancel all

Co-authored-by: medcl <64487+medcl@users.noreply.github.com>
Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/infinilabs/console/sessions/75cef488-e427-495a-b094-cb34809c0f5f

---------

Co-authored-by: medcl <64487+medcl@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: copilot-sdk-clojure
repository.description: Copilot SDK for Clojure

commit.message:
feat: port upstream copilot-sdk v0.2.0 changes

## Highlights

- **System message customize mode** (upstream PR #816): New :customize mode
  for :system-message enables section-level overrides of the Copilot system
  prompt with 10 configurable sections. Supports static actions (:replace,
  :remove, :append, :prepend) and transform callbacks.

- **18 experimental RPC method wrappers**: skills, mcp, extensions, plugins,
  compaction, shell, and ui.elicitation session methods.

- **15 new event types**: command.*, exit_plan_mode.*, mcp.oauth_*,
  session.tools_updated, session.background_tasks_changed, and more.

## Details

### New features
- system-prompt-sections constant exported from main namespace
- systemMessage.transform RPC handler for transform callbacks
- extract-transform-callbacks helper with correct snake_case wire IDs
- Section key mapping (section-kw->wire-id, wire-id->section-kw) in util.clj
- Function specs (s/fdef) and instrumentation for all new methods

### Bug fixes (caught during multi-model code review)
- Fixed callback lookup: string keys vs keyword keys mismatch
- Fixed wire format: static customize configs now properly serialized
- Fixed RPC param names: serverName for MCP, id for extensions, processId for shell
- Fixed section ID round-trip: snake_case preserved through kebab-case conversion
- Fixed specs: sections map accepts unknown keywords, replace mode requires content

### Housekeeping
- Version bumped to 0.2.0.0-SNAPSHOT
- CHANGELOG updated with v0.2.0 sync entries
- API.md updated with customize mode docs, new event types, RPC methods
- All 98 tests pass, docs validate, all 15 examples pass

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: copilot-sdk-clojure
repository.description: Copilot SDK for Clojure

feat: build complete College Club & Event Management System

- database/db_manager.py: SQLite DatabaseManager with all CRUD ops,
  schema for users/clubs/events/participation/attendance/payments/
  permissions/tasks, sha256 password hashing, seeded admin account
- models/: OOP wrappers (User, Club, Event, Participation, Attendance,
  Payment, Permission, Task) each delegating to DatabaseManager
- utils/validators.py: regex validators for email, password, username,
  date, time, UPI ID, card number
- utils/helpers.py: format_date, format_datetime, generate_pass_number,
  truncate, status_color, role_display
- gui/app.py: Main Tk App with frame manager and show_frame()
- gui/login_screen.py: Login + Registration with full validation
- gui/admin_dashboard.py: Sidebar nav, stats cards, club/event/user
  management, analytics with per-event participant counts
- gui/role_dashboard.py: Club Head/Event Head/Dept Head/Member dash
  with clubs, events, attendance, tasks, permissions sections
- gui/student_dashboard.py: Browse events, register, view passes,
  attendance history, club join/leave
- gui/club_management.py: Club panel + MemberListDialog
- gui/event_management.py: EventDialog for create/edit/delete events
- gui/event_registration.py: Registration popup + digital pass viewer
- gui/attendance_validation.py: Hierarchical validation with
  role/permission checks and live count updates
- gui/payment_screen.py: Mock payment with card/UPI/cash flows,
  input validation, 95% success simulation
- gui/work_tracking.py: Task assignment (hierarchical), status updates,
  progress bar, task list
- gui/search_screen.py: Keyword + date-range + club + status filters
- main.py: Entry point with headless-display graceful error handling

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(docs): apply markdownlint-cli2 auto-fix pass (RI-002)

Auto-fixes applied by markdownlint-cli2 --fix:
- MD010: hard tabs → spaces in code blocks
- MD031/MD032: blank lines around fenced code blocks and lists
- MD022: blank lines around headings
- MD007: unordered list indentation
- MD060: table formatting (leading and trailing pipes)
- MD029: ordered list item prefix

commit.message:
feat(skills): add update-bessa Copilot skill and workflow

Adds the update-bessa skill to automate bumping bessa_patterns.ts
to the latest (or a specified) release:

- .github/skills/update-bessa/SKILL.md — skill documentation
- .github/workflows/update-bessa.yml  — 12-step GitHub Actions workflow
- .github/SKILLS.md                   — skills index for the project

The workflow resolves the latest tag from the GitHub API, performs an
early-exit guard, updates the github:mpbarbosa/bessa_patterns.ts#TAG
reference in package.json, installs, validates TypeScript, runs tests,
adjusts version strings in src/ / docs / tests, and opens a PR via
peter-evans/create-pull-request@v7.

Trigger: weekly schedule (Tuesday 09:00 UTC) or workflow_dispatch.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(Frame): auto-hide back button on mobile, wire system back gesture

On platforms with a native back gesture (Android, iOS), the visual back
button is hidden via OnFormFactor and navigation is handled by
subscribing to TopLevel.BackRequestedEvent. This follows the same
pattern as MasterDetailsNavigator.RequiresBackButton().

The system back handler executes BackCommand when available and marks the
event as handled; if no BackCommand is set, the event bubbles up to
allow the OS default behavior (e.g., closing the app).

Desktop platforms retain the visual back button as before.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: HermanHiddema <1277212+HermanHiddema@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(opencode): fix MCP URL, sub-agent detection, and spinner lifecycle

Three bugs found from session logs:

1. Missing /mcp path in MCP URL
   customizeNewSession() used http://127.0.0.1:{port} but McpHttpServer
   listens at /mcp. OpenCode could not connect → no agentbridge_* tools
   registered → model fell back to native grep/read/search_text tools.

2. sub-agent not detected from empty rawInput
   OpenCode sends tool_call with rawInput:{} (empty), then fills actual
   args (subagent_type, description, prompt) in the follow-up
   tool_call_update/in_progress event. Added extractSubAgentType() override
   that recognises "task" title as a sub-agent even when rawInput is empty,
   defaulting to "general" agent type. Also added parseToolCallArguments()
   override to read from rawInput instead of the "arguments" key.

3. Sub-agent chip spinner never stopped
   tool_call_update/in_progress for a known sub-agent call was routed to
   updateSubAgentResult("running", ...) which the JS layer maps to "complete",
   closing the chip immediately. Subsequent completed update had no running
   chip to close. Fixed by returning early in updateToolCallUi() when
   isSubAgent && uiStatus == "running" — the chip stays in its running state
   until the actual completed/failed update arrives.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
refactor: move ACP client behavior out of AgentProfile into subclass overrides

Replace mid-method AgentProfile lookups in ACP clients with protected
method overrides, eliminating static-behavior-as-data antipattern.

- AcpClient: add `protected boolean excludeBuiltInTools()` (default false)
  replacing the profile lookup in `isToolBlocked()`
- JunieClient: override `excludeBuiltInTools()` → true; simplify
  `beforeLaunch()`, `onSessionCreated()`, `buildInstructions()`
- KiroClient: override `excludeBuiltInTools()` → true; make `buildCommand()`
  and `beforeLaunch()` unconditional (no profile lookups)
- AgentProfileManager: remove `setExcludeAgentBuiltInTools(true)` from
  Junie/OpenCode profiles; remove dead `setMcpConfigTemplate()` from
  OpenCode (ACP agents don't use ProfileBasedAgentConfig)
- AgentProfile: remove 6 dead fields never set for any built-in profile:
  `mcpEnvVarName`, `forceMcpInSessionNew`, `requiresResourceDuplication`,
  `modelUsageField`, `toolNameRegex`, `toolNameReplacement`
- ProfileBasedAgentConfig: remove `injectMcpViaEnvVar()` (ENV_VAR path
  unreachable); simplify `parseModelUsage()` → null; simplify
  `requiresMcpInSessionNew()` to remove `isForceMcpInSessionNew` branch;
  remove dead overrides for `requiresResourceDuplication`,
  `requiresResourceContentDuplication`, `getToolNameRegex`,
  `getToolNameReplacement` (all inherited defaults)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
